hero.title: Restore Your Mobility, Reclaim Your Life.
hero.subtitle: Expert physiotherapy and chiropractic care tailored to your unique recovery journey. We help you move better and feel stronger.

expertise.title: Specialized Care for Every Body
expertise.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive range of services to address your unique health needs and help you achieve your wellness goals.

items.title: Physiotherapy
items.description: Personalized treatment plans for injury recovery and pain relief.

items.title: Chiropractic
items.description: Spinal adjustments and alignment for optimal nervous system function.

items.title: Massage Therapy
items.description: Therapeutic techniques to reduce muscle tension and stress.

about.title: About Derma
about.content: At Derma, we believe in a holistic approach to physical health. Our team of dedicated professionals combines years of experience with the latest techniques to provide care that is as unique as you are. Whether you are recovering from an injury, managing chronic pain, or looking to improve your athletic performance, we are here to support you every step of the way.

booking.title: Book Your Appointment
booking.description: Take the first step towards a pain-free life. Fill out the form below and our team will contact you to confirm your session.

services.title: Physiotherapy
services.description: Comprehensive physical therapy for all ages.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: Flexora helped me recover from a severe knee injury in record time. Their personalized approach and expert care are truly unmatched.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: After months of back pain from sitting at a desk, the chiropractic care at Flexora has been life-changing. I feel stronger and more mobile than ever.
